description_long: This is a young adult woman with a slender build, standing with arms slightly outstretched. She is dressed in a short, sleeveless dress with a fitted bodice and a flared skirt, accessorized with a belt and a choker necklace. Her footwear consists of high-heeled shoes, and she has long, straight hair that extends well past her waist. The figure's skin is smooth, and her facial features are stylized, suggesting an animated or semi-realistic character design. The dress and shoes are visually coordinated, and she appears to be ready for a social or urban outing. No visible objects are being carried, and her posture is upright and neutral.
description: A young woman in a short, sleeveless dress with high heels and long, straight hair, standing upright with arms outstretched. She has a stylized, animated appearance and is accessorized with a belt and choker.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dress's neckline, belt, choker, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the dress, the length of the hair, and the high-heeled shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the hair, the back of the dress, and the heels.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile of the dress and hair, with arm and leg details.
attribute_clothing_type: short sleeveless dress with fitted bodice, flared skirt, belt, and choker necklace
